ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Required. Full path to the pandoc binary, or just `pandoc` to rely on $PATH.
ast.target: 必填。pandoc 二进制文件的完整路径，或仅输入 `pandoc` 以依赖 $PATH。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list. Used by "Export to all formats" when the manifest doesn't specify any.
ast.target: 逗号分隔的列表。当清单未指定任何格式时，“导出到所有格式”将使用此列表。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pandoc PDF engine used unless the book overrides it. Typst is recommended — single small binary, no LaTeX install needed.
ast.target: 除非书籍另有指定，否则使用此 Pandoc PDF 引擎。推荐 Typst — 单个小型二进制文件，无需安装 LaTeX。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: BCP-47 code (en, fr, ...) used when the manifest doesn't set one.
ast.target: BCP-47 代码（en, fr, ...），当清单未设置时使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated list of heading names (case-insensitive) to skip. Applied to the manifest before parsing (drops authoring scaffolding like "Title Options", "Target Audience") and to each linked note when inlining (drops housekeeping sections like "Related", "References").
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的标题名称列表（不区分大小写），用于跳过。在解析清单前应用（用于移除“标题选项”、“目标受众”等创作脚手架），并在内联笔记时应用于每个链接笔记（用于移除“相关”、“参考”等维护性章节）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Forwarded to pandoc as `-V monofont=…` for code blocks. Examples: Liberation Mono, DejaVu Sans Mono, JetBrainsMono NF.
ast.target: 作为 `-V monofont=…` 传递给 pandoc，用于代码块。示例：Liberation Mono、DejaVu Sans Mono、JetBrainsMono NF。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled (default), the TOC depth is computed from the deepest heading level actually present in the manifest (parts + chapters → depth 3, flat chapters → depth 2). Disable to fall back to the static TOC depth below. Per-book `book_export.toc_depth` always wins.
ast.target: 启用时（默认），目录深度将根据清单中实际存在的最深标题级别计算（部分+章节 → 深度 3，扁平章节 → 深度 2）。禁用则回退到下面的静态目录深度。每本书的 `book_export.toc_depth` 设置始终优先。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Used when "Auto TOC depth" is off, or when the manifest has no parseable heading.
ast.target: 当“自动目录深度”关闭，或清单中没有可解析的标题时使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Forwards `--number-sections` to pandoc — headings get hierarchical numbers (1, 1.1, 1.1.1, ...). Per-book override: `book_export.number_sections`.
ast.target: 将 `--number-sections` 传递给 pandoc — 标题将获得层级编号（1, 1.1, 1.1.1, ...）。每本书可覆盖：`book_export.number_sections`。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert a page break before each top-level section (the lowest-numbered heading level used in the manifest).
ast.target: 在每个顶级章节（清单中使用的最低编号标题级别）前插入分页符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Useful when an export fails to inspect the compiled manuscript.
ast.target: 当导出失败时，可用于检查编译后的手稿。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 在 X 上关注 Sébastien

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Related, References, Title Options, Target Audience
ast.target: 相关、参考、标题选项、目标受众

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Output folder is not configured. Set "Default output folder" in Settings → Book Exporter (e.g. ~/Downloads).
ast.target: 输出文件夹未配置。请在 设置 → 书籍导出器 中设置“默认输出文件夹”（例如 ~/Downloads）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Output folder is not configured. Set it in Settings → Book Exporter.
ast.target: 输出文件夹未配置。请在 设置 → 书籍导出器 中进行设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open the book manifest note before running this command.
ast.target: 请在运行此命令前打开书籍清单笔记。

ast.name: label
ast.source: None — notes flow into one another (legacy)
ast.target: 无 — 笔记直接衔接（旧版）

ast.name: message
ast.source: Missing or default `authors` field — falling back to "Anonymous".
ast.target: 缺少或使用默认的 `authors` 字段 — 回退为“匿名”。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No sections found. The manifest body must contain at least one ## heading with a list of wikilinks underneath.
ast.target: 未找到章节。清单正文必须包含至少一个 ## 标题，其下方有一个维基链接列表。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Manifest has sections but no resolved note references. Add bulleted wikilinks under your headings.
ast.target: 清单有章节但没有解析的笔记引用。请在标题下方添加带项目符号的维基链接。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将当前书籍导出为 EPUB

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将当前书籍导出为 PDF

ast.name: name
ast.source: Export current book to all formats
ast.target: 将当前书籍导出为所有格式
